assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: Line 56 of claude-md-result.md contains '## Security Configuration' as an H2 heading, followed by Product Lifecycle, Version Streams, and Source Repositories subsections.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Product Lifecycle' subsection with all 5 fields: Product pages URL (https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle), Jira version prefix (MYPRODUCT), Vulnerability issue type ID (10200), Component label pattern (pscomponent:), and VEX Justification custom field (customfield_12345)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 58-64 of claude-md-result.md contain '### Product Lifecycle' with all 5 required fields: 'Product pages URL: https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle' (line 60), 'Jira version prefix: MYPRODUCT' (line 61), 'Vulnerability issue type ID: 10200' (line 62), 'Component label pattern: pscomponent:' (line 63), 'VEX Justification custom field: customfield_12345' (line 64).

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Version Streams' subsection with a table containing at least one row for stream 2.1.x with the Konflux release repo URL
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 72-76 of claude-md-result.md contain '### Version Streams' with a table. Line 76 shows a row: '| 2.1.x | git.downstream.example.com/my-org/product-release.2.1.z | /home/user/product-release.2.1.z | security-matrix.md |'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Source Repositories' subsection with a table containing entries for backend and frontend-ui with their GitHub URLs
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 78-83 of claude-md-result.md contain '### Source Repositories' with a table. Line 82: '| backend | https://github.com/example/backend | upstream |' and line 83: '| frontend-ui | https://github.com/example/frontend-ui | upstream |'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md also contains the standard Project Configuration sections: Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence with Limitations, and Bug Configuration
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md contains: '## Repository Registry' (line 18) with a table of repositories, '## Jira Configuration' (line 26) with project key/cloud ID/etc., '## Code Intelligence' (line 33) with tool naming convention and '### Limitations' subsection (line 48), and '## Bug Configuration' (line 51) with bug issue type/template/link type.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 51-54 of claude-md-result.md contain '## Bug Configuration' with: 'Bug issue type ID: 10001' (line 52), 'Bug template: docs/bug-template.md' (line 53), 'Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks' (line 54).

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions Security Configuration being opted in by the user and fields being collected
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 62-83 of discovery-log.md contain 'Step 10 — Security Configuration' which states: 'User accepted when asked whether to enable security triage' (line 65, confirming opt-in), followed by 'Product Lifecycle fields collected:' (line 66) listing all fields including Product pages URL, Jira version prefix, Vulnerability issue type ID, Component label pattern, VEX Justification custom field, etc.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration and Bug Configuration were newly added along with the other Project Configuration sections
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md summary states 'Full Project Configuration created from scratch' (line 5). Section headers explicitly mark each as created: '### 1. Repository Registry — CREATED' (line 9), '### 2. Jira Configuration — CREATED' (line 18), '### 3. Code Intelligence — CREATED' (line 28), '### 4. Bug Configuration — CREATED' (line 35), '### 5. Security Configuration — CREATED' (line 44), '### 6. Hierarchy Configuration — CREATED' (line 62).
